headline: RTX (RTX): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: RTX trades at $198.71 and has moved in lockstep with the market. Its shares have returned 5.6% over the last six months while the S&P 500 has gained 8.4%.

headline: Is RTX (RTX) a Buy as Wall Street Analysts Look Optimistic?
summary: Based on the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), RTX (RTX) should be added to one's portfolio. Wall Street analysts' overly optimistic recommendations cast doubt on the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric. So, is the stock worth buying?

headline: Why RTX (RTX) Stock Is Up Today
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense company Raytheon (NYSE:RTX) jumped 3.4% in the afternoon session after the stock continued to rally as its Raytheon business was awarded a $1.1 billion contract from the U.S. Navy to produce AIM-9X Block II missiles.
